species: Two inducers of IKK activity, IL-1 and TNF, can increase AMPK Thr172 phosphorylation in serum-starved HeLa cells...
disease_state: could be used clinically to treat patients with LKB1-deficient cancers.
sample_source: IKK inhibition sensitizes LKB1-deficient cells to phenformin-induced apoptosis...
cell_line: Knockdown of the essential IKKβ scaffold protein NEMO by siRNA also blocked IL-1β-induced AMPK Thr172 phosphorylation in the LKB1-deficient A549 cells.
